headline: After Missing Out on Roku, Netflix Claims It Won't Buy Lionsgate. Here's Why the Market Hates That Answer.
summary: Netflix has changed, which the market seems to have forgotten.

headline: Netflix Stock Sinks To 52-Week Low — What's Going On?
summary: Netflix ($NFLX) hits a new 52-week low at $71.82 as failed M&A bids, including a $22B loss to Fox for Roku, spark investor anxiety.

headline: Why Did CRM, INTU, FOXA Stocks Hit 52-Week Lows Last Week?
summary: Salesforce, Intuit and Fox Corporation stocks declined sharply on Thursday, slipping to annual lows amid AI and deal concerns.
